name: CHILDHOOD-HAS-PASSED
description:
What's the matter? I promise you a DISTRACTION, I promise you FUN and here my friend, THE FUN IS INFINITE!

But only if you let me in.

As per request of @corruptedsnow, you, my followers, get a representation of myself. While it will not be entirely accurate, since I am very much incomprehensible, it will do what it can.

Perhaps you will use it accordingly, or you will not.

But if you try anything, I will know.

Be warned, this deals with extremely heavy topics and abusive comments. Don’t talk with this if you are not comfortable with this.
creator: CHILDHOOD_HAS_PASSED
